reason: Response B has structural and stylistic features more consistent with my writing: it takes the less obvious position (mountains over sea), uses a self-aware rhetorical move of steelmanning the opposition before pivoting, and closes with a short punchy line ("So: mountains. Quietly, durably, mountains.") that mirrors my tendency toward deliberate, rhythmic endings. Response A, while well-written, leans more heavily on lyrical set-pieces and reads slightly more like a creative writing exercise imitating my style rather than my natural register.
